MINI MINUTES: Appearances on THURS-OCT-23-2008: Marina R. Franco, counsel for plaintiff Brigitta A. Erpen, who is also present; Jeffrey Tyrrell, counsel by limited scope representation for defendant Wade Dai, who is also present

Settlement conference is held. The parties enter into a signed agreement which is not filed with the court this day. The MON-OCT-27-2008 trial date is vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Amanda Ebey, Clerk L. Fong, Not Reported (218)
